creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Details 👇🏼

Wednesday, March 4th is American Heroes Day at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City 🇺🇸

If you are:

👮‍♂️ Law Enforcement
🚒 Firefighters
🚑 EMTs / First Responders
🩺 Healthcare Professionals
🎖 Active Duty, Reserve, Retired Military or Veterans
👉 You get FREE admission with a valid ID at the gate. That’s it. Just show your credentials and walk right in.

This day is all about honoring the heroes in our communities — and I absolutely love that they do this. 💙

📍Florida Strawberry Festival
303 Berryfest Place, Plant City, FL

Festival runs Feb 26 – March 8, but March 4 is THE day to go if you qualify for free entry.

Tag your favorite hero below and make plans now. 🍓✨

#strawberryfestival #floridathingstodo #firstresponders #military #freeadmission

transcription.text: And I'm proud to be an American, where at least I know I'm free And I won't forget the men who died, who gave that right to me And I gladly stand up
